page_content:
Prerequisite: SLAA610.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

SLAA749 Special Topics in Second Language Learning (3 Credits) Current topics in research on Second Language Learning. Prerequisite: SLAA610; or permission of instructor.

SLAA750 Instructed Second Language Acquisition (3 Credits) Survey of studies on effectiveness of SLA instruction within various domains of language, with focus on research design.
